subcodes.first_line: O thou who art stirred by the fragrant breeze of the divine rose-garden, diffuse thy soul even as a musk-laden pouch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتز از نسیم عبیر گلشن الهى چون نافهء مشک جان بگشائى
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
